name: Ultimate Normality
description:
You wake up one morning with the "Power of Normality", a cosmic gift that ensures everything you say or do is accepted by society. Use it wisely!

~~ This bot is set up in a way that you should be able to use it in any universe/reality. You'll start the adventure in your bed, but aside from that, the story is yours! ~~

Inspired by "Normality" on CHYOA and @soundwave's "Let It Slide" bot.
creator: SwiftRichard
